ValidationRule.description: Make mandatory on Status set to 'No PoC Required'
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISCHANGED(Insolvency_Status__c), ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c,"No PoC Required"), ISBLANK(Reason_for_No_PoC_Required__c))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please enter Reasons for No PoC Required as Processing Status is No PoC Required
